title: Beta Evolved
description: Adds the aesthetic of classic Minecraft back into the game (Beta or Alpha) along with some of its features - for a nice blend of new and old, along with new content that fits the the exploration and sandbox nature of Classic Minecraft
body:
### Introduction

This modpack adds the aesthetic of classic Minecraft back into the game (Beta or Alpha) along with some of its features - for a nice blend of new and old, along with new content that fits the the exploration and sandbox nature of Classic Minecraft

### Content

**Classic**: Old health system is back! No more hunger bars, food heals your health. Classic art style returns as well, and so does old Minecraft terrain generation! 

**New**: On top of that explore content never seen before in Minecraft - new structures, caves, villages, ores, adventures. See new wild life & mobs, fght new enemy types, bosses, explore the depths of the sea, and conquer dungeons! Take on new quests, both personal and official - accomplishing new goals & objectives and never get bored with the vast endless new content!

### Mods

Performance: Uses the "Optimalsation" modpack as a baseline which is the fastest performing modpack avalible for Minecraft!

Exploration: Mods that tweak existing terrain, biomes, etc to be more like Beta - along with mods that add new structures to the game. This makes exploration way more interesting

Combat: Mods that add new dungeons and mobs, giving you new challenges to face, along with mods that tweak existing mobs to be more difficult along with adding unique bosses that can pose a serious challenge but offer worthwhile rewards!

QoL: Mods that make minecraft more user friendly, accessible and enjoyable like more intuitive keybinds, mouse handling, & much more

### Disclaimer

I include my own "Options.txt" file in order to ensure the resource packs are applied by default and in the correct order. However this file also copies all my other settings from FOV, keybinds, sensitivity, etc, so be sure to tweak things to your own preference because some of them will be different from vanilla

### Sprint vs No Sprint

This is probably the most controversial aspect of Alpha and Beta Minecraft is the lack of sprint, some prefer older versions but still like sprint while some want a very authentic experience. Due to its controversies its enabled by default, if you wish to disable it simply install the mod "[Take It Slow](https://modrinth.com/mod/take-it-slow)" or you can install a mod that adds a stamina system to the game for a nice blend. 

I've improved the speed of Minecarts and buffed horses for those of you who wish to play without it so these other methods of travel become more useful! Do note I increased the difficulty of the game in this mod & not having sprint will only make combat even more challenging.
